The Orion Health Rhapsody Integration Engine API provides management and monitoring capabilities for the Rhapsody healthcare integration platform. It enables programmatic control of integration routes, communication points, message queues, and system monitoring. Rhapsody supports HL7v2, FHIR, CDA, X12, DICOM, and other healthcare messaging standards for connecting disparate healthcare systems.

Contact Support:
